name: specark
description: Structured Prompt-Driven Development workflow for discovery intake, story creation, analysis, REASONS Canvas prompt generation, implementation, prompt updates, sync, and documentation sync.

interface.longDescription: SpecArk is a Codex plugin for Structured Prompt-Driven Development: discovery intake, story splitting, strategic analysis, REASONS Canvas prompt generation, implementation, prompt updates, sync, and documentation sync.
defaultPrompt: Use the spdd-orchestrator skill on @idea-of-the-enhancement.md in semi-auto mode.
Use the spdd-orchestrator skill in resume mode on @spdd/analysis/EXAMPLE.md.
Use the spdd-sync skill on spdd/prompt/EXAMPLE.md after this refactor.
Use the spdd-doc-sync skill. Added the spdd-doc-sync skill — update the docs page, index, VitePress config, and CLAUDE.md.
